source_evaluations.exact_locator: Exact 40-column system CSV header; no essential-service designation field
source_evaluations.exclusion_reason: The AHRQ system row binds identity but reports no essential-service designation count or approved taxonomy.

source_evaluations.exact_locator: CSV header and exact rows keyed by health_sys_id and CCN; schema fingerprint sha256:633359a9d9203acdcd4d2acec3d89761434e0cb0eeda9e8246c06a5f292e7150
source_evaluations.exclusion_reason: A 2023 CCN membership row is stale identity context, not a current designation or product-system crosswalk.

source_evaluations.exact_locator: ZIP member 2026Q3/PSF Parquet (April 2026)/IPSF_INP_LRO_2026-04-01.parquet; member sha256:d35f2489bdd61279a3817a93282d72c1a014f301ac434f83b860415f5df68925; 681137 bytes; columns include providerCcn, effectiveDate, terminationDate, providerType, and stateCode
source_evaluations.exclusion_reason: providerType and effective-record context are not countable without approved eligibility, expiry, combination-code, and crosswalk rules.

source_evaluations.exact_locator: Physical pages 371-374, Addendum A: CCN/providerType definitions and codes 07, 14-18, 21-23, and 37
source_evaluations.exclusion_reason: The manual defines facility payment classifications but does not approve an essential-service taxonomy or system rollup.

source_evaluations.exact_locator: Page identifies the April 2026 Parquet release and describes PSF as provider facts
